title: Dynamic Isolation Forest for Anomaly Detection in Post-PCI Myocardial Infarction Patients: Code and De-identified Development Cohort Data
author: Zhang, Yu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This record contains the de-identified local development cohort data, analysis scripts, result tables, figures, and supporting documentation for the study “Dynamic Isolation Forest for Anomaly Detection in Post-PCI Myocardial Infarction Patients”. 
 The dataset includes de-identified inpatient laboratory data from patients with myocardial infarction who underwent percutaneous coronary intervention (PCI). The accompanying scripts reproduce the fixed three-time-point window construction, feature extraction, model comparison, KNN-imputation sensitivity analysis, patient-level bootstrap stability analysis, and figure generation used in the local development cohort analysis. 
 This release package includes: 1. de-identified raw and processed development cohort data; 2. fixed-window manifests and expert-review related data; 3. Python scripts for preprocessing, model evaluation, sensitivity analyses, and bootstrap analyses; 4. main and supplementary result tables; 5. figures generated from the analysis scripts; 6. documentation files, including README and data dictionary files. 
 All direct patient identifiers have been removed before release. Dates and admission-related identifiers have been de-identified or transformed for privacy protection. The external MIMIC-IV supportive prognostic analysis is not included in this package.
